name: open_damos — EDC16C34 Bosch PSA
description: Free and open DAMOS for Bosch EDC16C34 PSA (DV6TED4, 1.6 HDi 75/90/110 hp: Berlingo, Partner, 206, 207, 307, 308, 407, C3, C4, Fiesta TDCi, Mazda 2/3 MZ-CD). Each entry includes an axis fingerprint enabling automatic relocation onto any firmware in the family, without needing the proprietary Bosch DAMOS. Exportable to standard ASAP2 A2L (usable in WinOLS, TunerPro, EcuFlash, open-car-reprog).

baseline.note: Addresses and fingerprints taken from ori.BIN (100% match with damos.a2l). For other firmwares (e.g. SW 1037383736 Berlingo II 1.6 HDi 75), fingerprint relocation finds the same maps at different offsets.

characteristics.name: AccPed_trqEngHiGear_MAP
characteristics.description: Driver's wish — engine torque requested by the accelerator pedal in high gears (4th/5th).

characteristics.name: AccPed_trqEngLoGear_MAP
characteristics.description: Driver's wish — engine torque requested by the accelerator pedal in low gears (1st/2nd/3rd).

characteristics.name: AccPed_trqPrp_MAP
characteristics.description: Driver's wish PROPULSION — torque requested for the mastershift (auto/semi-auto gearbox). 16×16 vs VSSCD_v (vehicle speed) and AccPed_rChkdVal (pedal).
characteristics.relocabilityNote: Propulsion MAP (auto/sequential gearbox) — absent on manual Berlingo/Partner.

characteristics.name: FMTC_trq2qBas_MAP
characteristics.description: Torque -> injected fuel quantity conversion (base). Central pivot of Stage 1: more requested torque = more injection.

characteristics.name: Rail_pSetPointBase_MAP
characteristics.description: Base rail (common rail) pressure setpoint, as a function of engine speed and injected quantity. Raise it to inject more fuel without combustion loss.

characteristics.name: EngPrt_trqAPSLim_MAP
characteristics.description: Torque limit for engine protection (turbocharger protection). If not raised, it clamps your Stage 1 gain -> the most important map to touch.

characteristics.name: FlMng_rLmbdSmk_MAP
characteristics.description: SMOKE LIMITER — minimum lambda setpoint vs air mass flow. This is what holds you back with black smoke if you can't raise injection high enough. Lower it (e.g. 1.2 -> 1.1) to allow more injection before the smoke cut.

stage1.note: Lowering lambda = more injection allowed. -5% = ~1.33 -> 1.26 lambda

characteristics.relocabilityNote: Smoke limiter calibrated differently between 75 hp and 110 hp — ori.BIN address not valid on Berlingo.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_phiMI1Bas2_MAP
characteristics.description: Start of energising Main Injection 1 (SOE MI1) — main injection angle, base. Advancing by 1-2deg for Stage 1 can improve low-load behaviour.

characteristics.name: AFSCD_facCorrVal_MAP
characteristics.description: Air mass flow correction factor (vs engine speed / fuel qty). Modified by some tuners to compensate for EGR.

characteristics.name: AFSCD_dmAirSubsVal_MAP
characteristics.description: Air mass flow substitute value (predictive model). Used when the MAF sensor fails — can be raised to force more optimistic values.

characteristics.name: Prp_rPrp_MAP
characteristics.description: Inverse map of the driver's demand for the mastershift (torque output -> equivalent pedal position).

characteristics.name: Rail_pSetPointMax_MAP
characteristics.description: Maximum rail pressure limiter (function of engine speed + injected qty). Raise only if you push Stage 2+ and Rail_pSetPointBase reaches this ceiling.

characteristics.name: EngPrt_qLim_CUR
characteristics.description: Fuel quantity limiter (engine protection) as a function of engine speed. Ceiling curve to raise so it doesn't clamp a big Stage 1/2.

characteristics.name: AFSCD_dmLin_CUR
characteristics.description: MAF sensor linearization curve (voltage -> air mass flow). Good to know but not to be touched in a standard Stage 1.

characteristics.name: FlSys_rhoTFuel_CUR
characteristics.description: Fuel density correction as a function of temperature. Not critical in Stage 1 but useful for some lambda strategies.

characteristics.name: AccPed_trqNMRMax_C
characteristics.description: Max torque allowed in the 'non-monitored range' (pedal limp mode). Stock 100 Nm — raise it if you increase Stage 1 by a lot.

characteristics.name: AccPed_nLimNMR_C
characteristics.description: Engine speed threshold for the 'non-monitored range'. Stock 1500 rpm.

characteristics.name: AirCtl_nOvrRun_C
characteristics.description: Engine speed threshold for the overrun condition (lift-off). Lower it -> pop&bang triggers more often. Be careful not to go below 1500 rpm (turbo).

relocation.note: Scalar VALUEs cannot be fingerprinted on their own — relies on proximity to a known MAP (same memory region in Bosch ECUs).

characteristics.name: AirCtl_qOvrRun_C
characteristics.description: Fuel quantity injected during overrun (pop&bang). Stock value = 50 (0.5 mg/stroke), raise to 500-2000 for crackles/bangs.

characteristics.name: VSSCD_vMax_C
characteristics.description: Vehicle speed threshold for the MAX-test (speed diagnostic). Stock ori.BIN = 220 km/h. Not the main limiter but consistent with it.

relocation.note: Scans a +/-4KB window around the anchored address for a value of 100-300 km/h.

characteristics.name: CrCCD_vSetSpdMax_C
characteristics.description: Cruise control / limiter — MAX value configurable by the driver. Stock ori.BIN = 254 km/h (cruise ceiling). Raise to 260+ to unlock the limiter.

characteristics.name: PrpCCD_vSetSpdMax_C
characteristics.description: MAX setpoint of the speed limiter (propulsion). Stock ori.BIN = 254 km/h. Another potential ceiling to raise.

characteristics.name: PrpCCD_vSetSpdMin_C
characteristics.description: Setpoint MIN du limiteur de vitesse (propulsion). Stock ori.BIN = 29 km/h.

characteristics.name: AirCtl_nMin_C
characteristics.description: EGR cut-off engine speed threshold. Raising it to 6000-8000 rpm (raw value 0x1770 or 0x1F40) disables EGR across the entire normal operating range.

egrOff.note: 8000 rpm = EGR never active (ecuedit forum method)

characteristics.name: AirCtl_rEGR_MAP
characteristics.description: Nominal requested EGR rate vs RPM (X axis) and air load (Y axis, normalized desired mass flow). Lowering all cells to 0 = map-based EGR OFF. Recommended method over modifying the AirCtl_nMin_C threshold alone.
characteristics.relocabilityNote: EGR axes completely different between 75 hp and 110 hp — ori.BIN fingerprint not applicable to the 75 hp Berlingo.

characteristics.name: EGRVlv_rPreCtlDyn_MAP
characteristics.description: Pre-commanded physical position of the EGR valve under dynamic conditions (RPM x coolant temperature). Drives the actuator directly. Set to 0 to cancel the EGR pre-command.

characteristics.name: EGRVlv_rPreCtlStat_MAP
characteristics.description: Pre-commanded physical position of the EGR valve in steady state (RPM x normalized load).

characteristics.name: AirSys_pAirBasRgn1_MAP
characteristics.description: Target air pressure (boost) in region 1 vs RPM (X axis) and pedal load (Y axis). Main VGT turbo calibration MAP. Raising the cells = more boost = more available torque. On the DV6BTED4 75 hp, values are ~15–20% lower than the 110 hp version.

data.note: Absolute pressure in mbar. 1013 mbar = atmospheric. 1800 mbar = 0.8 bar of boost.

characteristics.name: AirSys_pAirBasRgn2_MAP
characteristics.description: Target air pressure (boost) in region 2 (high load). Complements AirSys_pAirBasRgn1_MAP for high-load ranges.
characteristics.relocabilityNote: Region 2 boost calibration grid specific to the 110 hp ori.BIN firmware.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_phiMI1Bas1_MAP
characteristics.description: Main injection MI1 timing advance — operating region 1 (low engine speed). Advance in deg crankshaft vs RPM (X axis) and rail pressure (Y axis). Increase = advance injection = more efficiency (but knock risk). Decrease = retard = less NOx.

data.note: Degrees crankshaft before TDC. factor~=1/45. Positive value = advance.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_qMI1BasRgn1_MAP
characteristics.description: Main injection MI1 quantity — region 1 (low engine speed, light load). Quantity in mm3/stroke vs RPM (X axis) and rail pressure (Y axis). One of the MAPs that defines base power. Increase = more fuel = more torque. Combine with FMTC_trq2qBas_MAP.
characteristics.relocabilityNote: Injection quantity dimensions and axes differ on the 75 hp DV6BTED4 firmware.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_qMI1BasRgn2_MAP
characteristics.description: Main injection MI1 quantity — region 2 (high load). Full-load / acceleration operating range. Main MAP for Stage 1+ gains.
characteristics.relocabilityNote: Same as InjCrv_qMI1BasRgn1_MAP — 75 hp calibration not compatible with the 110 hp fingerprint.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_qMI1MaxRgn1_MAP
characteristics.description: Maximum allowed injection quantity (ceiling) — region 1. Absolute limit of injected fuel, independent of torque demand. If Stage 1 reaches this limit, raise these values to unlock the potential.

data.note: Absolute ceiling. Stage 1 without touching this ceiling = real gain still possible.

characteristics.name: FMTC_trq2qRgn1_MAP
characteristics.description: Torque->injection quantity conversion in region 1 (low engine speed, light load). Complements FMTC_trq2qBas_MAP — applies in the region 1 speed range. Increasing these values = more fuel for the same requested torque.

characteristics.name: FMTC_trq2qRgn2_MAP
characteristics.description: Torque->injection quantity conversion in region 2 (high load / full acceleration). The most important MAP for unlocking full-load power. Increase = more fuel = more black smoke if air is limited.

characteristics.name: Rail_pSetPointBasRgn_MAP
characteristics.description: Base rail pressure setpoint in the nominal operating range. Complements Rail_pSetPointBase_MAP for other calibration regions. Same logic: increase = better atomization = more possible power.

data.note: Pression rail en bar. Stock DV6BTED4 75ch : max ~1350 bar. DV6TED4 110ch : ~1600 bar.

characteristics.relocabilityNote: Rail pressure region axes differ on the 75 hp firmware.

characteristics.name: InjCrv_qPiI1Bas_MAP
characteristics.description: Base pre-injection (pilot injection PI1) quantity vs RPM x rail pressure. Pre-injection reduces combustion noise (diesel knock) and prepares the chamber for the MI. Set to 0 = pre-injection removed (more noise, lower consumption).

characteristics.name: AirCtl_mDesBas_MAP
characteristics.description: Base desired air mass vs RPM (X axis) and pedal load (Y axis). Defines the target of the air controller (combined VGT/EGR). Increase = more requested air = the turbo pushes more. Fundamental reference for any boost calibration.

data.note: Air mass flow in kg/h. Stock 75 hp full load ~85 kg/h, 110 hp ~100 kg/h.

characteristics.name: Eng_trqSpd_CUR
characteristics.description: Reference engine torque curve vs RPM. Used as a reference by the ECU for the torque models. Represents the manufacturer's torque/speed curve.

characteristics.name: EGRSCD_rLin_CUR
characteristics.description: Linearization curve of the EGR valve position sensor (EGRSCD). Converts sensor voltage into actual opening rate. Useful for understanding EGR corrections and adaptives.

data.note: EGR opening rate in %. 0 = closed, 10000x0.0039=~39% max.

changelog.note: Added boost (AirSys), full EGR, MI/PI injection timing+qty, FMTC regions, rail region, air mass desired. Fingerprints extracted from ori.BIN. Total: 40 entries.

knownFirmwares.vehicle: Citroën Berlingo I / Peugeot Partner 1.6 HDi 55kW 75 hp (DV6BTED4, engine code 9HW)
knownDiff: AccPed_trqEngHiGear_MAP et AccPed_trqEngLoGear_MAP partagent les mêmes axes pédale dans ce firmware 75hp (axe Y identique) — la désambiguïsation se fait uniquement par proximité de defaultAddress.
FMTC_trq2qRgn1_MAP : axe Y légèrement différent en 75hp (RPM bas 500/600/800 au lieu de 550/700/850 en ori.BIN 110hp) — match bag/strict.
InjCrv_qMI1BasRgn1_MAP et InjCrv_qMI1BasRgn2_MAP : absents dans ce firmware 75hp (dims 17×19 introuvables).
knownFirmwares.note: OBD MPPS dump — calibration only. DTC table DSM_ClaDfp absent (BDM needed). Test réalisé avec ressources/edc16c34/9663944680.bin.
